title: Fee magic number 10_000 lacks ZIP-317 reference
description: e2e_testnet.rs line 365 asserts alice balance >= PAYMENT_AMOUNT_ZATOSHI + 10_000. The 10_000 zatoshi is an assumed minimum fee with no named constant and no citation of ZIP-317 (which defines the conventional fee). If send_payment uses a different fee schedule the assertion may silently under-constrain the balance check. Should be a named constant with a comment citing the fee basis.
close_reason: P3/P4 deferred: below stopping threshold (P0=0, P1=0, SEC7 says STOP)
